description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and defines a single stage named test. Add a job called test in the test stage that executes the following shell commands in order: npm install, npm run lint, npm test, npm install -g codecov, and codecov --token=0635d3a9-a5c8-4b48-b0cd-4b718b21c25e. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules.
